thread.title:
You are a non-interactive worker agent. Produce clean, structured output to stdout.
Do NOT use mcp__relaycast__agent_add, add_agent, or any MCP tool to spawn sub-agents.
Do NOT use mcp__relaycast__message_dm_send or any Relaycast messaging tools — you have no relay connection.

Implement the v1 routing package using docs/architecture/v1-routing-implementation-plan.md and docs/specs/v1-routing-spec.md.

Required work:
- create/update package files under packages/routing/
- implement the minimal routing mode/types/runtime for v1
- implement cheap/fast/deep and latency/depth/cost policy primitives within bounded scope
- implement clean hooks/interfaces for connectivity interaction without taking over connectivity
- keep workforce alignment visible in naming and semantics without importing external provider logic
- write tests for the intended first routing workflows
- update packages/routing/README.md from placeholder to actual package documentation

Expected package shape:
- packages/routing/package.json
- packages/routing/tsconfig.json
- packages/routing/src/index.ts
- packages/routing/src/types.ts
- packages/routing/src/routing.ts
- packages/routing/src/routing.test.ts
- packages/routing/README.md

Requirements:
- TypeScript-first
- no cloud assumptions
- no product-specific logic
- no provider SDK ownership
- no transport implementation
- keep the package runnable/testable in isolation

IMPORTANT:
- write files to disk
- do not print full file contents to stdout
- end packages/routing/README.md with ROUTING_PACKAGE_IMPLEMENTED

---
IMPORTANT: You are running as a non-interactive subprocess. Do NOT call mcp__relaycast__agent_add, add_agent, or any MCP tool to spawn or manage other agents.

CRITICAL REQUIREMENT — YOU MUST FOLLOW THIS EXACTLY:
You are running in non-interactive mode. There is NO opportunity for follow-up, clarification, or additional input. Your stdout output is your ONLY deliverable.

You MUST:
1. Complete the ENTIRE task in a single pass — no partial work, no "I'll continue later"
2. Print your COMPLETE deliverable to stdout — this is the ONLY output that will be captured
3. Be thorough and self-contained — another agent will consume your output with zero context about your process
4. End with a clear summary of what was accomplished and any artifacts produced

DO NOT:
- Ask questions or request clarification (there is no one to answer)
- Output partial results expecting a follow-up (there will be none)
- Skip steps or leave work incomplete
- Output only status messages without the actual deliverable content
